A Relic Reborn._line: The 2.x Zodiac questline — start 'A Relic Reborn' from the Weaponsmith of Gridania in Old Gridania.
A Relic Reborn.Atma: Farm 12 Atma from FATEs across the original A Realm Reborn zones (one per element).
A Relic Reborn.Animus: Complete the nine Trials of the Braves books (dungeons, FATEs, leves and enemies).
A Relic Reborn.Nexus: Fill the weapon with Light by running duties while it is equipped.
A Relic Reborn.Zeta: Fill nine Mahatma with Light to finish the Zodiac Zeta.

Anima Weapons._line: The Heavensward Anima questline — start 'Soul Without Life' in Idyllshire.

Eureka Weapons._line: Progressed entirely inside The Forbidden Land, Eureka — farm the matching zone's crystals and light, then turn in to Gerolt.
Eureka Weapons.Base: Claim the base Eurekan weapon from Gerolt after starting the Eureka quest line in Rhalgr's Reach.
Eureka Weapons.Eureka: Trade Eureka Fragments (from Eureka Hydatos and the Baldesion Arsenal) toward the Physeos upgrade.
Eureka Weapons.Physeos: Final form — trade further Eureka Fragments to Gerolt in Eureka Hydatos.

Resistance Weapons._line: The Bozja / Save the Queen questline — start 'Hail to the Queen' in Kugane.

Manderville Weapons._line: The Endwalker Manderville questline from Jubrunnah in Radz-at-Han — each step also needs a tomestone-bought material.

Phantom Weapons._line: The Dawntrail relic questline from the Occult Crescent (South Horn) — trade Arcanite earned there.

Lucis Tools.Mastercraft: Base tools from your level 50 Disciple of the Hand/Land class quest.
Lucis Tools.Supra: Trade the Mastercraft tool with Fieldcraft Demimateria III and Mastercraft Demimateria (Purple Crafters' Scrips).
Lucis Tools.Lucis: Trade the Supra tool with Moonstone and crafted items (Company Seals / Allied Seals).

Skysteel Tools._line: The Heavensward Skysteel Tool questline — start with Stephanivien in The Pillars (Ishgard).

Resplendent Tools._line: Shadowbringers crafter/gatherer relic — craft collectables and turn them in to Limbeth in Eulmore across several stages, finishing with 60 of the final material (Purple Crafters' Scrips).

Splendorous Tools._line: The Endwalker Splendorous Tool questline — start with Mowen's Merchant in Radz-at-Han.

Cosmic Tools._line: Dawntrail crafter/gatherer relic — earned through Cosmic Exploration on Sinus Ardorum; no crafting materials, just research and mission deliveries.

Eurekan Armor._line: Field armor from The Forbidden Land, Eureka — start from the Antiquated artifact set, then upgrade Base → +1 → +2 → Anemos via Gerolt.

Resistance Armor._line: Field armor from the Bozjan Southern Front and Zadnor — earned via lockboxes, the large-scale raids and cluster exchanges.

Phantom Armor._line: Field armor from the Occult Crescent (South Horn) — earned alongside the Phantom relic weapon.
